series_metadata.series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. These records provide proof of attempt of licensure/incomplete files for barber student applicants. May contain social security numbers, education information and birth certificates

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from registration date, if not enrolled in barber school and
